heading: Definitions
label: 7702 Definitions
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title IV of , , , known as the Plant Protection Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title IV to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 106–224114 Stat. 438section 7701 of this titleJune 20, 2000
amendments: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title IV of , , , known as the Plant Protection Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title IV to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 106–224114 Stat. 438section 7701 of this titleJune 20, 2000

children.heading: Article
children.label: 1 Article
children.text: The term “article” means any material or tangible object that could harbor plant pests or noxious weeds.

children.heading: Biological control organism
children.label: 2 Biological control organism
children.text: The term “biological control organism” means any enemy, antagonist, or competitor used to control a plant pest or noxious weed.

children.heading: Enter and entry
children.label: 3 Enter and entry
children.text: The terms “enter” and “entry” mean to move into, or the act of movement into, the commerce of the United States.

children.heading: Export and exportation
children.label: 4 Export and exportation
children.text: The terms “export” and “exportation” mean to move from, or the act of movement from, the United States to any place outside the United States.

children.heading: Import and importation
children.label: 5 Import and importation
children.text: The terms “import” and “importation” mean to move into, or the act of movement into, the territorial limits of the United States.

children.label: A
children.text: from one State into or through any other State; or

children.label: B
children.text: within the District of Columbia, Guam, the Virgin Islands of the United States, or any other territory or possession of the United States.

children.label: A
children.text: between a place in a State and a point in another State, or between points within the same State but through any place outside that State; or

children.label: B
children.text: within the District of Columbia, Guam, the Virgin Islands of the United States, or any other territory or possession of the United States.

children.heading: Means of conveyance
children.label: 8 Means of conveyance
children.text: The term “means of conveyance” means any personal property used for or intended for use for the movement of any other personal property.

children.label: A
children.text: to carry, enter, import, mail, ship, or transport;

children.label: B
children.text: to aid, abet, cause, or induce the carrying, entering, importing, mailing, shipping, or transporting;

children.label: C
children.text: to offer to carry, enter, import, mail, ship, or transport;

children.label: D
children.text: to receive to carry, enter, import, mail, ship, or transport;

children.label: E
children.text: to release into the environment; or

children.label: F
children.text: to allow any of the activities described in a preceding subparagraph.

children.heading: Noxious weed
children.label: 10 Noxious weed
children.text: The term “noxious weed” means any plant or plant product that can directly or indirectly injure or cause damage to crops (including nursery stock or plant products), livestock, poultry, or other interests of agriculture, irrigation, navigation, the natural resources of the United States, the public health, or the environment.

children.heading: Permit
children.label: 11 Permit
children.text: The term “permit” means a written or oral authorization, including by electronic methods, by the Secretary to move plants, plant products, biological control organisms, plant pests, noxious weeds, or articles under conditions prescribed by the Secretary.

children.heading: Person
children.label: 12 Person
children.text: The term “person” means any individual, partnership, corporation, association, joint venture, or other legal entity.

children.heading: Plant
children.label: 13 Plant
children.text: The term “plant” means any plant (including any plant part) for or capable of propagation, including a tree, a tissue culture, a plantlet culture, pollen, a shrub, a vine, a cutting, a graft, a scion, a bud, a bulb, a root, and a seed.

children.label: A
children.text: A protozoan.

children.label: B
children.text: A nonhuman animal.

children.label: C
children.text: A parasitic plant.

children.label: D
children.text: A bacterium.

children.label: E
children.text: A fungus.

children.label: F
children.text: A virus or viroid.

children.label: G
children.text: An infectious agent or other pathogen.

children.label: H
children.text: Any article similar to or allied with any of the articles specified in the preceding subparagraphs.

children.label: A
children.text: any flower, fruit, vegetable, root, bulb, seed, or other plant part that is not included in the definition of plant; or

children.label: B
children.text: any manufactured or processed plant or plant part.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 16 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.

children.heading: State
children.label: 17 State
children.text: The term “State” means any of the several States of the United States, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, the District of Columbia, Guam, the Virgin Islands of the United States, or any other territory or possession of the United States.

children.heading: Systems approach
children.label: 18 Systems approach
children.text: For the purposes of , the term “systems approach” means a defined set of phytosanitary procedures, at least two of which have an independent effect in mitigating pest risk associated with the movement of commodities.section 7712(e) of this title

children.heading: This chapter
children.label: 19 This chapter
children.text: Except when used in this section, the term “this chapter” includes any regulation or order issued by the Secretary under the authority of this chapter.

children.heading: United States
children.label: 20 United States
children.text: The term “United States” means all of the States.
